hard.name: 教室冲突 (room conflict)
hard.triggerCondition: Two slots with same dayOfWeek + slotIndex + roomId and overlapping week sets
hard.notes: Full score uses O(n^2) pairwise comparison; delta score uses O(n) per-other iteration.

hard.name: 教师冲突 (teacher conflict)
hard.triggerCondition: Two slots with same teacherId at same dayOfWeek + slotIndex and overlapping weeks
hard.primaryKey: (slotA, slotB) at same day/idx with teacherId match

hard.name: 班级冲突 (class conflict)
hard.triggerCondition: Two slots sharing a classGroupId at same dayOfWeek + slotIndex and overlapping weeks
hard.primaryKey: (slotA, slotB) at same day/idx with classGroupId match
hard.notes: Nested loop over taskClasses — handles merged-class.

hard.name: 容量超限 (capacity overflow)
hard.notes: delta uses ctx.roomById.get(roomId) for both old/new; falls back silently if missing.

hard.name: 教室不可用 (room unavailable)
hard.wrapperCoverage: F8 (F8A fixture pre-populates room 0 to prevent spurious fire)
hard.notes: isRoomAvailable returns false when room not in roomById. F8 wrapper pre-populates room 0.

hard.name: 林校教室限制 (non-automotive forbid Linxiao)
hard.triggerCondition: task is non-automotive / mixed / unknown per classGroup membership, placed in Linxiao room
hard.notes: classGroup membership is primary; courseName/remark auxiliary. HC6 locked-slot skeleton is intentionally not scored.

soft.name: 跨楼栋连续课 (cross-building back-to-back)
soft.triggerCondition: Same day + |idx diff|=1 + different building + (same teacher OR shared class)
soft.primaryKey: per ordered pair (slotA, slotB) at adjacent idx same day
skipRules: neither same teacher nor shared class
soft.sharedHelper: getBuilding + inferBuilding (full and delta both call)
soft.notes: K22-D added SC1 delta logic; A.2 case is regression guard. Original HIGH risk (K22-A) is RESOLVED.

soft.name: 同天多节 (same-day multi-session)
soft.triggerCondition: Same teachingTask with N>=2 slots on the same dayOfWeek
soft.sharedHelper: inline (full uses taskDayCount map; delta iterates slotsByTask siblings)

soft.name: 跨校区通勤 (cross-campus commute)
soft.triggerCondition: Same teachingTask, same day, adjacent slotIndex, different Room.building
soft.primaryKey: per (slotA, slotB) at same day/idx adj with task match
soft.notes: Uses room.building only (no inferBuilding fallback). Semantic difference from SC1. Carried-over LOW finding.

soft.name: 教师每日课时负载均衡 (teacher day balance)
soft.triggerCondition: For one teacher: total >= 3 weekday lessons AND (maxLoad - minLoad) > 2
soft.notes: Aggregate per teacher. Delta uses excludeSlotId + overrideDay pattern. 3rd-position originalAssignments isolates MIN_PERT.

soft.name: 汽车专业优先林校 (automotive prefers Linxiao)
soft.triggerCondition: task is AUTOMOTIVE_ONLY per classGroup membership, placed in non-Linxiao room
soft.notes: Companion to HC6. Largest soft penalty. Wins over SC10 (soft-priority).

soft.name: 周末一般不排课 (weekend avoidance)
soft.notes: Heavy penalty. Default snapshot does not trigger.

soft.name: 班级空洞减少 (class gap reduction)
soft.triggerCondition: For one (classGroup, day) with N>=2 weekday lessons, sum of empty periods between adjacent lessons
soft.notes: Aggregate per (classGroup, day). Merged-class tasks count once per classGroup. F11A: H8 fixture received surgical classGroupStudentCounts update for SC10 isolation.

soft.name: 教室稳定性 (teaching task room stability)
soft.triggerCondition: For one teachingTask with N>=2 weekday slots, penalty per extra distinct room
soft.wrapperCoverage: F8 (K22-F8 classroom stability wrapper, F8A isolated)
soft.notes: Aggregate per teachingTask. Task-level (not expanded to classGroup). F8A component-level isolation.

soft.name: 教室容量利用率 (room capacity utilization)
soft.triggerCondition: utilization = studentCount / room.capacity. Skip if room=0, room missing, capacity<=0, count<=0, util>1.0 (HC4 owns).
soft.wrapperCoverage: F11 (K22-F11 capacity preference wrapper, F11A isolated)
soft.notes: Per-slot evaluation, NOT aggregate. Delta is O(1) per move. F11A cross-harness isolation policy: surgical classGroupStudentCounts updates for H8 and F3 MIXED.

perturbation.name: 最小扰动 (minimum perturbation)
perturbation.triggerCondition: slot assignment differs from originalAssignments on day/idx/room
perturbation.harnessSection: Harness A (A.3, A.3b, A.4 net effect)
perturbation.notes: Both paths compare against originalAssignments. 3rd-position originalAssignments trick in F4/F6/F8/F11 harness isolates SC5/SC8/SC9/SC10 contribution by making MIN_PERT net 0.

sections.notes: Compares full vs delta via re-evaluation. A.1 (SC2), A.2 (SC1 regression guard), A.3/A.3b (MIN_PERT introduction), A.4 (MIN_PERT removal).
Each HC verified against baseline state with no soft noise. B2-SEPARATION verifies hard/soft tagging.
C1 asserts hardScore=0, softScore=-11, SC2=1, SC3=1. C2 verifies MIN_PERT in perturbed state. Snapshot written to docs/k22-score-default-snapshot.json.
D1 runs solve() with seed=42, asserts hardScore preserved and iterations > 0. D2 verifies determinism.
E1 verifies 4 K21-FIX-F/G scripts present. E2 verifies no score.ts or solver.ts imports in K21 config files.

sections.scope: Specialty campus weekend constraints (HC6 / SC6 / SC7)
sections.notes: F1-F4 (HC6), F5-F6 (SC6), F7-F8 (SC7), F9-F11 (delta). Isolated fixtures with Linxiao keyword, automotive keyword, weekend day. 3rd-position originalAssignments in delta cases.
6 full cases (G1-G6) + 3 delta cases (G7-G9) with 3rd-position originalAssignments isolating MIN_PERT. Teacher with varying same-day load distributions.

8 full + 4 delta. F6A isolation: teacherId=null (SC5), 1 slot per task (SC2), periods <5 (SC3). Component-level: total soft + SC8 details count + sum. F11A: H8 fixture received surgical classGroupStudentCounts update for SC10 isolation (preserves SC8 semantics).

7 full + 4 delta. F8A isolation: teacherId=null, single task with multiple slots, weekday-only for delta, 3rd-position originalAssignments, room 0 pre-populated as UNSCHEDULED. Component-level assertion.

8 full + 5 delta. F11A isolation: teacherId=null, 1 task 1 slot for delta (avoids SC2/SC9), weekday-only for delta, 3rd-position originalAssignments, per-room capacity, extraRoomIds. Component-level: total soft + SC10 details count + sum. Added in K22-F11 commit 3dd6945; F11A commit 5e82388 documented isolation policy.

harnessSummary.canonical: 73 PASS / 0 KNOWN_FAIL / 0 FAIL / 0 INFO (per K22-F11A commit 5e82388, re-verified at K22-F12)

defaultSnapshot.sc5Sc6Sc7Sc8Sc9Sc10AbsentReason:
SC5: requires teacherId!=null AND total >= 3 weekday lessons. Default fixture has 3 tasks with no teacher / single lessons, so teacher total < 3 (skip).
SC6/HC6: requires Linxiao keyword in room.name. Default fixture rooms A/B/C have no Linxiao keyword (skip).
SC7: requires dayOfWeek >= 6. Default fixture is weekday-only (skip).
SC8: requires classGroup with 2+ periods on same day AND a gap. Default fixture has no such pattern (skip).
SC9: requires teachingTask with 2+ distinct rooms in [1..5]. Default fixture has each task in only 1 room (skip).
SC10: requires studentCount > 0 AND capacity > 0. Default fixture has all default cap=50, single-class FALLBACK=50 → util=1.0 → SC10 SKIP (HC4 owns; but HC4 does not fire either since util=1.0 not > 1.0). Wait — util=1.0 IS NOT > 1.0 so SC10 evaluates 0.90 threshold: 1.0 > 0.90 → tight -2 would fire. But actual default snapshot shows SC2=1 SC3=1, so SC10 must NOT fire. Reason: default snapshot harness uses classGroupStudentCounts: [30] (not FALLBACK), so studentCount=30, util=30/50=0.60 (in band, no fire).

rules: Surgical fixture update on synthetic params like studentCount is acceptable.
Surgical updates MUST be documented in (a) code comment, (b) impl doc, (c) impl JSON.
Surgical updates MUST NOT change: classGroup membership, room, day/period, expected constraint contribution.
Forbidden: changing test expected* value to absorb new constraint contribution.

blocked: SC4 specialty classroom matching (Room.type = NORMAL for all 53 rooms)
partialOverlap: NEW-SC-06 (same-class consecutive switch) may overlap SC8
NEW-SC-05 (large class priority) is subsumed by SC10 tight branch

nextStages.rationale: addresses F12-D-1 LOW (penalty hardcoded). Read-only audit of how weights could enter SchedulingConfig.
unblocks specialty classroom matching. Planning-only stage.
if K22 main goal is sufficient, do closeout and move to other main lines.

dataQualityDependencies.blocker: SC4 theory vs practice vs lab

findings.title: K22-C Harness A-J is at 73 PASS / 0 KNOWN_FAIL / 0 FAIL / 0 INFO
findings.currentStatus: K22-C has 10 sections: A (5), B (6), C (2), D (2), E (2), F (11), G (9), H (12), I (11), J (13). Total = 73. F8 added 11 I cases (60 → 71). F11 added 13 J cases (60 → 73). F11A did not modify case count. Re-verified at F12 commit 5e82388 (parent).
evidence: K22-C summary block: PASS=73, KNOWN_FAIL=0, FAIL=0, INFO=0, BLOCKING=NO
docs/k22-score-regression-harness-implementation.json: harnessSections field has 10 sections, sums to 73
findings.recommendation: Continue using 73/0/0/0 as the canonical baseline. If any future stage deviates, treat as HIGH + BLOCKING.

findings.title: Default snapshot is stable: hardScore=0 / softScore=-11 / SC2=1 / SC3=1
findings.currentStatus: Default snapshot is unchanged from F8 / F9 / F10 / F11 / F11A. SC2=1 (one task with 2 same-day slots in slotIndex 1+2) and SC3=1 (one slot at slotIndex=5). No HC fires (no conflict). No SC5/SC6/SC7/SC8/SC9/SC10 fire (insufficient data in fixture).
evidence: See snapshot.sc5Sc6Sc7Sc8Sc9Sc10AbsentReason for detailed skip-rule analysis
findings.risk: No risk. Snapshot is the canonical regression anchor.
findings.recommendation: Continue using this snapshot as the regression anchor in K22-C Harness C.

findings.title: F11A cross-harness fixture isolation policy is documented and in effect
findings.currentStatus: F11A documented the policy in 3 places: (1) docs/k22-capacity-preference-constraint-impl.md Section 9.5, (2) docs/k22-capacity-preference-constraint-impl.json f11ACrossHarnessFixtureIsolation field, (3) inline code comments in scripts/verify-specialty-campus-weekend-constraints-k22-f3.ts and scripts/verify-score-regression-harness-k22-c.ts. Policy: (a) component-level assertion preferred, (b) surgical fixture update on synthetic params like studentCount, (c) forbidden to change test expected* value. H8 + 3 F3 MIXED cases received surgical classGroupStudentCounts updates with explicit ISOLATION-only rationale.
findings.risk: No risk. Policy is documented and effective.
findings.recommendation: Continue enforcing the policy for K22-F12+ future constraints.

findings.title: Penalty scale: 11 hardcoded constants; SC6 (-20) is largest soft, dominates when both fire
findings.currentStatus: Hard: -1000 (HC1-HC5, HC6) — uniform. Soft range: -1 (SC3) to -20 (SC6). SC6 dominates when both SC6 and SC10 fire (e.g. AUTO_ONLY task in non-Linxiao with poor utilization). This is intentional: SC6 enforces campus-wide specialty preference; SC10 is a per-slot tiebreaker. No weighted aggregation; all penalties are fixed scalars.
evidence: prisma/schema.prisma: SchedulingConfig has no weight fields
findings.risk: LOW. Penalty scale is intentional. No correctness bug. Productization concern only.
findings.recommendation: Open K22-I-SCORE-WEIGHTS-AUDIT (read-only) to evaluate how to expose hardWeights / softWeights in SchedulingConfig. Do NOT implement weights in this stage. The penalty scale is currently intentional and well-balanced for the school in scope.

findings.title: P0 / new-business / SC10 all complete. P2 candidates blocked on schema. P1 candidates may overlap with existing constraints.
findings.currentStatus: DONE: SC5 (F4), SC8 (F6), SC9 (F8), SC10 (F11), HC6 (F3), SC6 (F3), SC7 (F3). BLOCKED: SC4 specialty room matching (Room.type = NORMAL for all 53 rooms), NEW-SC-08/09/10 (Teacher preference / campus preference / home room — schema-dependent). PARTIAL OVERLAP: SC5 (teacher day balance) may overlap with NEW-SC-07 (teacher half-day), SC8 (class gap) may overlap with NEW-SC-06 (same-class consecutive switch), SC10 (capacity utilization) may overlap with NEW-SC-05 (large class priority). Capacity-based P1 (NEW-SC-05) is now subsumed by SC10.
evidence: docs/k22-room-type-data-quality-audit.md: Room.type = NORMAL for all 53 rooms (BLOCKING for specialty classroom)
findings.risk: LOW. No immediate action. Roadmap is well-categorized.
findings.recommendation: Open K22-G2-ROOM-TYPE-SCHEMA-PLAN (planning) if room-type matching is the goal. Open K22-I-SCORE-WEIGHTS-AUDIT (audit) if weight tuning is the goal. Do NOT open NEW-SC-07/06 directly without audit (potential overlap with SC5/SC8). NEW-SC-05 (large class) is effectively subsumed by SC10 tight branch.

recommendedNextStage: K22-I-SCORE-WEIGHTS-AUDIT (preferred — addresses F12-D-1 LOW) OR K22-G2-ROOM-TYPE-SCHEMA-PLAN (preferred if specialty classroom is the goal) OR K22-ROADMAP-CLOSEOUT-AUDIT (if K22 main goal is sufficient)
notes: K22-F12 is a read-only summary refresh. No Prisma writes, no score.ts changes, no schema changes, no API / frontend / importer / parser / RBAC changes.
K22-C summary 73/0/0/0 is confirmed via re-verification at F12 (parent commit 5e82388).
Default snapshot is unchanged: hardScore=0, softScore=-11, SC2=1, SC3=1.
Penalty scale is intentional; SC6 (-20) is the largest soft penalty and dominates when both fire. No correctness bug.
Penalty constants remain hardcoded (carried-over MEDIUM from K22-A-C-1 / K22-E-F-1 / F12-D-1).
F11A cross-harness fixture isolation policy is documented and in effect.
No new constraint is implemented in this stage. K22-F12 is audit-only.
